mano_cua.result_summary: 应用显示为基础在线IDE（Real-Time Collaborative Online IDE），创建文件后只有代码编辑器，未找到USACO判题相关功能区域（JudgeInterface/USACO Results）。mano-cua尝试浏览导航栏、创建文件、打开DevTools搜索USACO组件，均未发现判题结果界面。92步耗尽后被硬超时停止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The application shows a basic IDE without visible USACO judging interface. Spent 92 steps navigating the app, creating files, trying DevTools console to search for USACO components, but could not locate the JudgeInterface or USACO Results panel. The USACO judging functionality does not appear to be accessible through the current UI.
